_comment: Pinned source of truth for the ungreppable doc-claim classes: business dates, marketing superlatives, and canonical external URLs. Free-prose copies of these facts across the main repo AND the sibling atmosphere.github.io repo are validated against this file by scripts/validate-facts-registry.sh. Born from drift-log entries #21 (unverified 'first Java framework' superlative) and #22 ('support since 2014' should have been 2013). Edit THIS file when a fact legitimately changes; the validator then forces the prose to follow.

date_assertions.label: real-time infrastructure for the JVM since
shipping/bridge-authorship since
date_assertions.pattern: every bridge on this page since ([0-9]{4})
